case.title: YADKIN RIVER POWER CO. v. WHITNEY, CO

opinion.h1: YADKIN RIVER POWER CO. v. WHITNEY, CO, 214 U.S. 503 (1909)
opinion.h2: YADKIN RIVER POWER CO., Plaintiff in Error, v. WHITNEY CO. No. 835.
opinion.p: Frederick M. Leonard for plaintiff in error.
Messrs. Thomas Patterson, Burton Craige, Thomas J. Jerome, and W. A. Way for defendant in error.
Writ of error dismissed for the want of jurisdiction.
